steps.title: Rewrite the right side
steps.content:
The equation is
$x^2=40(40)$
The right side is $40$ multiplied by itself, so
$x^2=40^2$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the equation and use the positive intersection with the $x$-axis, or take the positive square root of both sides. $x=40$ The answer is 40.
